problem: Why do amyloid plaques form in Alzheimer's and can they be cleared?
hypothesis: Monoclonal antibody blocking protein-protein interaction may resolve Why do amyloid plaques form in Alzheimer's and can they be cleared? by activating at the molecular level.

experiment.protocol: Randomized controlled trial Phase I with 6 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.
